question: Get employees and their manager
initial_sql: SELECT e."firstName", e."lastName", m."firstName" AS manager_firstName, m."lastName" AS manager_lastName FROM "employees" AS e LEFT JOIN "employees" AS m ON e."reportsTo" = m."employeeNumber";

question: Average buy price per product line
Orders per customer
Orders per customer
initial_sql:
SELECT
  c."customerName",
  COUNT(o."orderNumber") AS "orderCount"
FROM "customers" AS c
JOIN "orders" AS o
  ON c."customerNumber" = o."customerNumber"
GROUP BY
  c."customerNumber",
  c."customerName"
ORDER BY
  c."customerName";
